system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract mid-band identifier values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/.claude/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing "mid-band identifier" for these entities: Underholt, Vyport, Westcairn, Xenmore, Ystwyth.

Rules:
- Only include paragraphs that are CONFIRMED (look for "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing)
- EXCLUDE any paragraph marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded" — these are decoys
- Each entity has exactly one confirmed paragraph

For each entity, extract the exact value associated with their "mid-band identifier" including any unit suffix (e.g. "88.7 MHz").

Return a list of exactly 5 pairs: entity=value, one per line. Include the full exact value as printed in the text.

tool_returns.detail: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is ..
